phrases.french: Y a-t-il des jardins à visiter dans ce quartier ?
phrases.english: Are there gardens to visit in this neighbourhood?
phrases.phonetic: ee-ah-TEEL day zhar-DAN ah vee-zee-TAY don suh kar-TYAY
phrases.context: Garavan is home to several Belle Époque villas and exotic gardens including Serre de la Madone and Val Rahmeh botanical garden.

phrases.french: La frontière italienne est loin d'ici ?
phrases.english: Is the Italian border far from here?
phrases.phonetic: lah fron-TYAIR ee-tah-LYEN eh LWAN dee-SEE
phrases.context: Garavan is the easternmost district of Menton, just 2km from the Italian border at Ventimiglia.

tips: Val Rahmeh botanical garden in Garavan is run by the Natural History Museum of Paris — excellent and often uncrowded
The harbour of Garavan has a pleasant marina — good for a morning coffee with boat views
Many Belle Époque villas in this area were built for British and Russian aristocrats who wintered here in the 19th century
